components.name: dbt Docs Enriched Project
components.description: Extends DbtProjectComponent to surface rich dbt docs metadata: exposures, metrics, semantic models, contracts, source freshness, and clickable docs links on every asset

components.name: LiteLLM Inference Asset
components.description: Enrich rows from an upstream asset using any LLM via LiteLLM (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure, Bedrock, Gemini, and 100+ more)

components.name: Ollama Inference Asset
components.description: Enrich rows from an upstream asset using a locally-running Ollama model (no API key required)

components.name: LangChain Chain Asset
components.description: Run a LangChain chain over rows from an upstream asset and write enriched output to a database table

components.name: OpenAPI Asset
components.description: Fetch an OpenAPI spec once at prepare time, discover GET endpoints grouped by tag, and create one Dagster asset per tag group. Cached via StateBackedComponent for fast code-server reloads.

components.name: Warehouse Schema Assets
components.description: Introspect a database warehouse at prepare time and create one external AssetSpec per table, with full column schema metadata. Cached via StateBackedComponent.

components.name: AWS Step Functions Asset
components.description: Discover all AWS Step Functions state machines at prepare time and create one Dagster asset per state machine. Triggers executions and polls for completion. Cached via StateBackedComponent.

components.name: Dataiku Asset
components.description: Discover all Dataiku DSS scenarios across projects at prepare time and create one Dagster asset per scenario. Triggers scenario runs and polls for completion. Cached via StateBackedComponent.

components.name: Polytomic Asset
components.description: Discover all Polytomic reverse ETL syncs at prepare time and create one Dagster asset per sync. Triggers sync runs and polls for completion. Cached via StateBackedComponent.

components.name: Terraform Asset
components.description: Run terraform apply (or plan/destroy) as a Dagster asset. Provision infrastructure before running data pipelines — downstream assets declare deps on this asset.

components.name: Terraform Cloud Asset
components.description: Discover all HCP Terraform workspaces at prepare time and create one Dagster asset per workspace. Triggers remote runs and polls for completion. Cached via StateBackedComponent.

components.name: CloudFormation Asset
components.description: Deploy or update an AWS CloudFormation stack as a Dagster asset. Idempotent via change sets — creates stack on first run, updates on subsequent runs.

components.name: Ansible Asset
components.description: Run an Ansible playbook as a Dagster asset with real-time log streaming. Configure servers or prepare infrastructure before running data pipelines.

components.name: Pulumi Asset
components.description: Deploy a Pulumi stack as a Dagster asset. Supports up, destroy, and preview operations with JSON output parsing and stack outputs as metadata.

components.name: Helm Deploy
components.description: Install or upgrade a Helm chart as a Dagster asset. Deploy Kubernetes workloads (ML serving, databases, tools) before running dependent pipeline assets.

components.name: AWS CDK Asset
components.description: Deploy AWS CDK stacks as a Dagster asset with real-time log streaming and stack outputs as metadata. Provision infrastructure before running data pipelines.

components.name: SSH Asset
components.description: Run commands on remote hosts via SSH as a Dagster asset. YAML-configurable command sequences with streaming logs, SFTP upload/download, and env-var-based auth.

components.name: HashiCorp Vault
components.description: Fetch secrets from HashiCorp Vault and inject them as environment variables before pipeline runs. Supports token and AppRole auth.

components.name: Jupyter Notebook Asset
components.description: Execute a parameterized Jupyter notebook as a Dagster asset via Papermill. YAML-configurable parameters, output notebook as artifact, metadata surfaced from last cell.

components.name: Modal Asset
components.description: Trigger a Modal serverless function as a Dagster asset. SDK and CLI execution paths, GPU workloads, detach mode, return value as metadata.

components.name: Pinecone Asset
components.description: Upsert, delete, query, or create a Pinecone vector index as a Dagster asset. Batched upserts from upstream assets or databases. Common in RAG pipelines.

components.name: MLflow Model Sensor
components.description: Fire a RunRequest when an MLflow model transitions to a target stage (e.g. Production) in the Model Registry. Enables model-driven pipeline triggers.

components.name: AutoSys Asset
components.description: Discover AutoSys jobs and Box Jobs at prepare time, create one Dagster asset per job with full dependency graph from JIL conditions. REST API (v12+) with CLI fallback. Replaces AutoSys's text-based JIL with visual Dagster lineage.

components.name: Twilio Notification Sensor
components.description: Send SMS or WhatsApp notifications when Dagster assets fail or succeed. Matches the slack_notification and pagerduty_alert sensor pattern.
